creator: gpaquin@videotron.ca
text:
I'm currently running FreeBSD 4.3 on an IBM ThinkPad 770 ED.
I would like to know how to configure a PCMCIA card.
The card I have to use is an IBM Token Ring 16/4 Turbo pcmcia.
This was working properly on a linux (redhat 7.0) with this card
Is there any driver or special config to do to make this work ?
Thanx
